---
title: "CompareNeuroLipidAtlas"
output: html_document
date: '2025-09-15'
---


## Read MOFA 2 Lipidomics (Targeted) weights
```{r}
dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/OneDrive - Radboudumc/Old_laptop_files/NeuroLipidAtlas/'

MOFa_Lipid_weights <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, "factorweights_Lipidomics__Targeted___imputed___log.xlsx"), rowNames = TRUE)
```


## Read CSV files of reference data sets
```{r}
LF_vanderKant <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_neurons_van_der_Kant.csv'))
LF_lipid_Isaacs_C9_ASO <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_C9-knockdown_Isaacs_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Isaacs_FAT <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_FAT-1_2_3_Isaacs_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Isaacs_LV_G4C2 <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Control_C9 repeat_Isaacs_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Feringa_AD <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Feringa_AD_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Feringa_Brain <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Feringa_Brain_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Feringa_iPSC_Neuron <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Feringa_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Isaacs_C9rep <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Isaacs_C9rep_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Isaacs_FTLD <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Isaacs_FTLD_total_norm_data.csv'))
LF_lipid_Ward_TMEM106B <- read.csv(paste0(dir_NeuroAtlas_downloads, 'LF_Ward_total_norm_data.csv'))


Neuro_Lipids_Datasets <- list(
  vanderKant = LF_vanderKant,
  Feringa_AD = LF_lipid_Feringa_AD,
  Feringa_Brain = LF_lipid_Feringa_Brain,
  Feringa_iPSC_Neuron = LF_lipid_Feringa_iPSC_Neuron,
  Isaacs_C9_ASO = LF_lipid_Isaacs_C9_ASO,
  Isaacs_FAT = LF_lipid_Isaacs_FAT,
  Isaacs_FTLD = LF_lipid_Isaacs_FTLD,
  Isaacs_LV_G4C2 = LF_lipid_Isaacs_LV_G4C2,
  Isaacs_C9rep = LF_lipid_Isaacs_C9rep,
  Ward_TMEM106B = LF_lipid_Ward_TMEM106B
)
```


```{r}
# Function to convert custom lipid IDs to LipidMaps style
convert_to_lipidmaps <- function(lipids) {
  sapply(lipids, function(x) {
    # Handle triacylglycerols TG.*
    if (grepl("^TG\\.", x)) {
      # TG.56.6.FA22.6 -> TG.56:6-FA22:6
      x <- sub("TG\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)\\.FA(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)", "TG.\\1:\\2-FA\\3:\\4", x)
    }
    # Handle plasmalogens PE.P.*
    else if (grepl("^PE\\.P\\.", x)) {
      # PE.P.16.0.16.0 -> PE.P-16:0/16:0
      x <- sub("PE\\.P\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)", "PE.P-\\1:\\2/\\3:\\4", x)
    }
    # Handle diacyl lipids like PC.*, PE.*, PA.*, PS.*, PI.*, etc.
    else if (grepl("^[A-Z]{2,3}\\.", x)) {
      x <- gsub("\\.", ":", x)   # simple dot to colon for single-chain lipids
      x <- gsub("_", "/", x)     # replace underscore with slash
    }
    # Return the converted lipid
    return(x)
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}


# apply to your list
harmonized <- convert_to_lipidmaps(rownames(MOFa_Lipid_weights))

match(harmonized, LF_lipid_Feringa_AD$lipid)
```



```{r}
## Function to compare MOFA ranking (e.g. log fold changes, p-values, or another score) with the rankings in the external datasets.
cor_lipid_datasets <- function(MOFA_df, Factor, Ref_DF) {
  
  ## Unify lipid IDs
  rownames(MOFA_df) <- convert_to_lipidmaps(rownames(MOFA_df))

  
  # Ranked list based on MOFA loadings
  ranked_mofa_lipids <- rownames(MOFA_df[order(MOFA_df[,Factor], decreasing = T),])
  
  
  # Ranked list of reference datasets
  ranked_ref_lipids <- Ref_DF[order(Ref_DF$log2FC, decreasing = T), "lipid"]
  
  names(ranked_mofa_lipids) <- ranked_mofa_lipids
  names(ranked_ref_lipids) <- ranked_ref_lipids

  # Get only common lipids
  common <- intersect(names(ranked_mofa_lipids), names(ranked_ref_lipids))
  
  # Extract ranks, preserving each dataset's original order
  mofa_ranks <- rank(match(common, names(ranked_mofa_lipids)))
  ref_ranks  <- rank(match(common, names(ranked_ref_lipids)))
  
  # Spearman correlation
  cor.test(mofa_ranks, ref_ranks, method = "spearman")

}


cor_lipid_datasets_list <- function(MOFA_df, Factor, ref_list) {
  
  # Unify lipid IDs
  rownames(MOFA_df) <- convert_to_lipidmaps(rownames(MOFA_df))
  
  # Sort MOFA by the factor of interest
  ranked_mofa_lipids <- rownames(MOFA_df[order(MOFA_df[, Factor], decreasing = TRUE), ])
  
  # Initialize results dataframe
  results <- data.frame(
    Ref_Dataset = character(),
    Spearman_rho = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric(),
    n_overlap = integer(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Loop over reference datasets
  for (i in seq_along(ref_list)) {
    ref_df <- ref_list[[i]]
    
    # Sort reference dataset by log2FC
    ranked_ref_lipids <- ref_df$lipid[order(ref_df$log2FC, decreasing = TRUE)]
    
    # Find common lipids
    common <- intersect(ranked_mofa_lipids, ranked_ref_lipids)
    if(length(common) == 0) next
    
    # Get ranks in each dataset, **preserving their own order**
    mofa_ranks <- rank(match(common, ranked_mofa_lipids))
    ref_ranks  <- rank(match(common, ranked_ref_lipids))
    
    # Spearman correlation
    cor_res <- cor.test(mofa_ranks, ref_ranks, method = "spearman")
    
    # Store results
    # Store results
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
      Ref_Dataset = names(ref_list)[i],
      Spearman_rho = cor_res$estimate,
      p_value = cor_res$p.value,
      n_overlap = length(common)
    ))
  }
  
  return(results)
}



library(fgsea)

gsea_lipid_datasets_list <- function(MOFA_df, Factor, ref_list, top_n = 50) {
  
  # Unify lipid IDs
  rownames(MOFA_df) <- convert_to_lipidmaps(rownames(MOFA_df))
  
  # Rank MOFA lipids by the factor of interest
  mofa_scores <- MOFA_df[, Factor]
  names(mofa_scores) <- rownames(MOFA_df)
  mofa_scores <- sort(mofa_scores, decreasing = TRUE)
  
  # Define gene set: top N MOFA lipids
  my_set <- list(MOFA_top = names(mofa_scores)[1:top_n])
  
  # Initialize results dataframe
  results <- data.frame(
    Ref_Dataset = character(),
    ES = numeric(),
    NES = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric(),
    #padj = numeric(),
    n_overlap = integer(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Loop over reference datasets
  for (i in seq_along(ref_list)) {
    ref_df <- ref_list[[i]]
    
    # Make a named vector of log2FC values (ranked list for fgsea)
    ext_ranks <- ref_df$log2FC
    names(ext_ranks) <- convert_to_lipidmaps(ref_df$lipid)
    ext_ranks <- sort(ext_ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
    
    # Restrict to common lipids
    common <- intersect(names(ext_ranks), unlist(my_set))
    if (length(common) == 0) next
    
    # Run fgsea (multilevel by default)
    fgseaRes <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = my_set, stats = ext_ranks)
    
    # Store results
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
      Ref_Dataset = names(ref_list)[i],
      ES = fgseaRes$ES,
      NES = fgseaRes$NES,
      p_value = fgseaRes$pval,
      #padj = fgseaRes$padj,
      n_overlap = length(common)
    ))
  }
  
  return(results)
}



```


# Spearman correlations

## Factor 1
```{r}
results_Factor1 <- cor_lipid_datasets_list(MOFA_df = MOFa_Lipid_weights, Neuro_Lipids_Datasets, Factor = 'Factor1')
results_Factor1$p.adj <- p.adjust(results_Factor1$p_value, method = 'BH')
```

## Factor 2
```{r}
results_Factor2 <- cor_lipid_datasets_list(MOFA_df = MOFa_Lipid_weights, Neuro_Lipids_Datasets, Factor = 'Factor2')
results_Factor2$p.adj <- p.adjust(results_Factor2$p_value, method = 'BH')
```



# Gene set enrichment

# Factor 1
```{r}
gsea_results_Factor1 <- gsea_lipid_datasets_list(MOFA_df = MOFa_Lipid_weights, Neuro_Lipids_Datasets, Factor = 'Factor1')
gsea_results_Factor1$p.adj <- p.adjust(gsea_results_Factor1$p_value, method = 'BH')
```

## Factor 2
```{r}
gsea_results_Factor2 <- gsea_lipid_datasets_list(MOFA_df = MOFa_Lipid_weights, Neuro_Lipids_Datasets, Factor = 'Factor1')
gsea_results_Factor2$p.adj <- p.adjust(gsea_results_Factor2$p_value, method = 'BH')
```


## Fisher's exact test on lipid classes
```{r}
compare_class_composition <- function(MOFA_scores,
                                      refs,
                                      stat_col = "log2FC",
                                      top_n = 50,
                                      adjust_method = "BH") {
  get_class <- function(x) sub("\\..*", "", x)
  
  # MOFA top_n classes
  top_lipids <- rownames(MOFA_scores[order(MOFA_scores$Factor1, decreasing = TRUE),])[1:top_n]
  top_mofa_classes <- get_class(top_lipids)
  
  results <- list()
  
  for (ref_name in names(refs)) {
    ref_df <- refs[[ref_name]]
    top_ref <- ref_df$lipid[order(ref_df[[stat_col]], decreasing = TRUE)][1:top_n]
    top_ref_classes <- get_class(top_ref)
    
    # contingency table
    tbl <- table(
      Dataset = c(rep("MOFA", length(top_mofa_classes)),
                  rep("Ref",  length(top_ref_classes))),
      Class = c(top_mofa_classes, top_ref_classes)
    )
    
    # Fisher exact test (global)
    ft <- fisher.test(tbl, simulate.p.value = TRUE)  # simulate if large
    results[[ref_name]] <- data.frame(
      ref = ref_name,
      pval = ft$p.value,
      n_mofa = length(top_mofa),
      n_ref = length(top_ref),
      overlap_classes = length(intersect(unique(top_mofa_classes),
                                         unique(top_ref_classes)))
    )
  }
  
  results_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
  results_df$padj <- p.adjust(results_df$pval, method = adjust_method)
  rownames(results_df) <- NULL
  return(results_df)
}





results_df <- compare_class_composition(MOFa_Lipid_weights, Neuro_Lipids_Datasets)
results_filtered <- results_df[is.finite(results_df$OR) & results_df$OR > 0, ]

```
